hotel_name: Sunlight Condotel Hà Nội (Sunlight Condotel Hanoi)

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: The staff's attitude is extremely poor, they require a deposit of 1 million VND while I had already paid the full amount for the room. When I asked, they said, "Go ask on Agoda." The room was filled with the smell of cigarettes that wouldn't go away, the floor was dirty, kitchen utensils were not provided, and I wasn't allowed to cook even though I rented the apartment for convenience. I was very dissatisfied with the service and will never return.

reviews.title: Hard to find
reviews.text: They didn't speak english , very hard tó find the apartments
